description_long: This nightstand features a minimalist, modern design with a rectangular body crafted from light-colored wood, displaying a subtle, natural wood grain pattern across all surfaces. The front face is defined by a large, open cubby space with rounded interior corners, providing accessible storage without any visible drawers or doors. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing lamps, books, or decorative items. The nightstand stands on four slightly splayed, tapered wooden legs, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic and elevating the main body above the ground. The sides and back are solid, with the wood grain continuing seamlessly around the structure. There are no visible handles, hardware, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing its clean and functional appearance.
description: A light wood nightstand with a large open cubby, flat top, and four tapered legs, featuring a minimalist, mid-century modern style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open cubby space and the rounded interior corners, with two tapered legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood grain side panel and two splayed legs, with no openings or handles visible.
description_view_2: Rear angled view similar to the front, showing the open cubby and the opposite set of legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with a solid wood grain panel and two legs visible.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
